title: V6.8E 宏观解释层闭环
confidence: 样本观察 + 低频宏观事实；不足以形成全市场确定判断
candidate_implication: 宏观信息只作为复核背景；候选股仍需按单股基本面、估值分位、现金流和风险清单独立判断。

confirmed_facts.name: 000001.SH 指数涨跌
confirmed_facts.limitation: 指数走势是市场背景，不改变候选评分或标签。

confirmed_facts.name: 000300.SH 指数涨跌
confirmed_facts.limitation: 指数走势是市场背景，不改变候选评分或标签。

confirmed_facts.name: 399001.SZ 指数涨跌
confirmed_facts.limitation: 指数走势是市场背景，不改变候选评分或标签。

confirmed_facts.name: GDP同比
confirmed_facts.limitation: Uses quarter/gdp/gdp_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: GDP现价总量
confirmed_facts.limitation: Uses quarter/gdp/gdp_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: CPI同比
confirmed_facts.limitation: Maps national CPI YoY/MoM from nt_yoy/nt_mom. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: PPI同比
confirmed_facts.limitation: cn_ppi mapping: headline PPI uses ppi_yoy and ppi_mom; prior probe expected ppi_mp, but actual fields are ppi_mp_yoy/ppi_mp_mom for production-material sub-series. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: 制造业PMI
confirmed_facts.limitation: cn_pmi uses uppercase coded fields. MONTH is the date field; PMI010000 is mapped to headline manufacturing PMI, PMI010100 to production sub-index pending dictionary review. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: 生产指数PMI
confirmed_facts.limitation: cn_pmi uses uppercase coded fields. MONTH is the date field; PMI010000 is mapped to headline manufacturing PMI, PMI010100 to production sub-index pending dictionary review. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: M2同比
confirmed_facts.limitation: Uses m2_yoy/m1_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: M1同比
confirmed_facts.limitation: Uses m2_yoy/m1_yoy directly. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: 社融当月增量
confirmed_facts.limitation: sf_month does not return YoY in probe. 宏观展示缓存 displays original inc_month/stk_endval only; units require Tushare field-document confirmation and YoY derivation is deferred. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: 社融存量
confirmed_facts.limitation: sf_month does not return YoY in probe. 宏观展示缓存 displays original inc_month/stk_endval only; units require Tushare field-document confirmation and YoY derivation is deferred. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: LPR 1年
confirmed_facts.limitation: shibor_lpr maps 1Y/5Y LPR from fields named 1y and 5y. Display only; not used in scoring.

confirmed_facts.name: LPR 5年
confirmed_facts.limitation: shibor_lpr maps 1Y/5Y LPR from fields named 1y and 5y. Display only; not used in scoring.

sample_observations.name: 样本上涨家数/下跌家数/平盘家数
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 stock_daily 覆盖样本，不代表全 A 股
sample_observations.limitation: 样本数量不足以推断全市场宽度。

sample_observations.name: 样本上涨占比
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 stock_daily 覆盖样本，不代表全 A 股
sample_observations.limitation: 只能作为样本观察，不能写成全市场偏冷/偏热判断。

sample_observations.name: 样本成交额合计
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 stock_daily 覆盖样本
sample_observations.limitation: 单位未确认，不进入主判断。

sample_observations.name: 样本 PE 中位数
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 market_daily_basic 覆盖样本
sample_observations.limitation: 样本估值温度代理，不代表全市场估值分布。

sample_observations.name: 样本 PB 中位数
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 market_daily_basic 覆盖样本
sample_observations.limitation: 样本估值温度代理，不代表全市场估值分布。

sample_observations.name: 样本总市值合计
sample_observations.coverage: 仅本地 market_daily_basic 覆盖样本
sample_observations.limitation: 单位未确认，不进入主判断。

insufficient_for_judgment.name: 全 A 市场宽度
insufficient_for_judgment.reason: 当前 stock_daily 最新日只可确认本地覆盖样本，不能证明覆盖全 A。
insufficient_for_judgment.needed: 全 A stock_daily 最新交易日完整覆盖和覆盖率校验。

insufficient_for_judgment.name: 全市场估值温度
insufficient_for_judgment.reason: 当前 market_daily_basic 只能作为本地样本；PE/PB 中位数不应写成全市场结论。
insufficient_for_judgment.needed: 全市场 daily_basic 覆盖、停牌/异常值处理和口径确认。

insufficient_for_judgment.name: 成交额和总市值单位
insufficient_for_judgment.reason: amount/total_mv 原接口单位在当前产物中未完成复核。
insufficient_for_judgment.needed: 按 Tushare 官方字段口径复核后再进入主判断。

insufficient_for_judgment.name: 宏观 SQLite 正式表
insufficient_for_judgment.reason: macro_cn_* / macro_sf_month / macro_shibor_lpr 当前 SQLite 表为空；页面使用 宏观展示缓存 sidecar 缓存展示。
insufficient_for_judgment.needed: 如要正式缓存或入库，需要单独批准下载和写入方案。
